task: Bug fixes from log/report review: credit lines in body, chunk truncation, archaic words, degraded placeholders, Bengali leakage, duplicate headings
last_action: Fixed 7 issues: strip_metadata() call in orchestrator (root cause of credit lines in body), improved stitch_chunk_boundaries() with SHORT_LINE_THRESHOLD fallback, replace_archaic_words() with Myanmar-specific consonant boundaries (no \b), undo_archaic_corruptions() to fix pre-existing corruptions, fix_degraded_placeholders(), strip_translated_metadata(), always-strip Chinese/Bengali/Indic scripts. Re-cleaned Ch14/Ch15/Ch16 output. 280/280 tests pass.

session_errors.error: Translator: Skyfarrow Editor: Skyfarrow translated to Myanmar and appeared in Ch14/15/16 output. Source lines not stripped because orchestrator _preprocess() never called strip_metadata().
session_errors.resolved_by: Added strip_metadata() call in orchestrator _preprocess(). Added strip_translated_metadata() postprocessor defense-in-depth.

session_errors.step: Chunk boundary truncation at consonant starts
session_errors.error: stitch_chunk_boundaries() only stitched when next line started with medial character. Truncated lines followed by consonant-started lines were not caught.
session_errors.resolved_by: Added Strategy 2: if line < SHORT_LINE_THRESHOLD (150 chars), no sentence-ender, next line has Myanmar → stitch them.

session_errors.error: Python \b regex treats Myanmar combining marks (Mn category) as \W, creating false word boundaries inside compound words like ထိုင်ခိုင်း → အဲဒီင်ခိုင်း.
session_errors.resolved_by: Replaced \b with Myanmar-specific consonant lookahead/lookbehind. Added undo_archaic_corruptions() to fix pre-existing corruptions.

session_errors.error: Postprocessor only stripped Chinese, Bengali, Thai but not Tamil or other Indic scripts. Ch15 had 7 Tamil characters (எண்ணற்ற).
session_errors.resolved_by: Added _INDIC_PATTERN covering Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Devanagari, Sinhala. Always stripped in clean_output().

session_errors.error: remove_duplicate_headings() used line.strip() which doesn't remove BOM, causing first heading (with BOM) to go unrecognized.
session_errors.resolved_by: Changed to line.strip().lstrip('\ufeff') to handle BOM characters.

session_errors.step: Bare # အခန်း heading not deduplicated
session_errors.error: Ch16 had bare # အခန်း (no number) mid-body that survived dedup because bare headings were tracked separately from numbered ones.
session_errors.resolved_by: Bare heading after any numbered heading is now treated as duplicate.
